name: Receipt
description: Order receipt with a line-item table, right-aligned total, and a link to the hosted receipt. The template owns the items table; items_html supplies only the rows.
subject: Your {{company_name}} receipt — {{order_id}}

variables.name: company_name
variables.description: Sender company or product name; rendered as the header wordmark and in the footer.

variables.name: support_email
variables.description: Support contact email address shown in the footer.

variables.name: company_address
variables.description: Physical mailing address for the footer (CAN-SPAM).

variables.name: preheader
variables.description: Hidden inbox preview text shown next to the subject line.

variables.name: items_html
variables.description: Raw pre-rendered line-item rows for the receipt table: one <tr> per item with exactly two inline-styled <td> cells — item name/quantity left-aligned, price right-aligned. Rows only; the template owns the parent table and the total row.
variables.example: 1× Pro plan (monthly)$29.001× Extra seat$10.00

variables.name: items_text
variables.description: Plain-text line items for the text part, one item per line, hard-wrapped to 70 characters.

variables.name: total
variables.description: Formatted order total, including currency symbol.

variables.name: receipt_url
variables.description: URL of the hosted receipt or invoice.
